commands.repair_reason: Contributor changes and real behavior proof are needed; automation cannot supply the external after-fix CLI or wizard proof for them.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a supply-chain regression by accepting existing managed npm contents without the normal plugin validation, lockfile provenance, or security scan path.; Review finding: [P1] Validate cached packages before returning success — src/plugins/install.ts... (sha=63e83432afaf71fa8e53b0be302c53b269f8a386)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an install-mode fast path in the managed npm plugin installer plus focused tests to skip npm install when the existing package version is greater than or equal to the requested version.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves the managed npm install root and rejects an existing package directory in install mode before comparing installed and requested versions. I did not run a live Docker wizard reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor changes and real behavior proof are needed; automation cannot supply the external after-fix CLI or wizard proof for them.

target.title: fix(plugins/install): skip reinstall when installed plugin version satisfies requested
target.author: hclsys
